title: WATCH:  Miracle baby goes home after 9 months in NICU
fullText: Miracle baby goes home after 9 months in NICUBaby Myla spent her first nine months of life in the NICU at the same hospital where her mother was cared for after being born prematurely.February 25, 2026
summary: Baby Myla spent her first nine months of life in the NICU at the same hospital where her mother was cared for after being born prematurely.
